scripts.e2e:prepare: HOME=$PWD wrangler d1 migrations apply thesis_tracker_db --local --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e && HOME=$PWD wrangler d1 execute thesis_tracker_db --local --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e --file tests/e2e/mock-data.sql
scripts.e2e:dev: HOME=$PWD wrangler dev --local --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e --var APP_PASSWORD:e2e-password --var SESSION_SECRET:e2e-session-secret
scripts.e2e:server: npm run e2e:prepare && npm run e2e:dev
